languages.text: [Зевнуть] "Все эти копания в династической рухляди навевают скуку. Мне обязательно отвечать на ваши вопросы?"
[Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"
languages.original_text: [Зевнуть] "Все эти копания в династической рухляди навевают скуку. Мне обязательно отвечать на ваши вопросы?"

[Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"

languages.text: 【打哈欠】“翻这些王朝老古董已经够烦人了。我还得回答你的这些问题吗？”
languages.original_text: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"

traits.locale_text: 【打哈欠】“翻这些王朝老古董已经够烦人了。我还得回答你的这些问题吗？”

languages.text: [Bostezar] «Encuentro tedioso hurgar en su basura dinástica. ¿De verdad es necesario que responda a sus preguntas?».
languages.original_text: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"

traits.locale_text: [Bostezar] «Encuentro tedioso hurgar en su basura dinástica. ¿De verdad es necesario que responda a sus preguntas?».

languages.text: [Bâiller] « Ces fouilles dans le bric-à-brac de la dynastie m'épuisent. Est-il vraiment nécessaire que je réponde à vos questions ? »
languages.original_text: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"

traits.locale_text: [Bâiller] « Ces fouilles dans le bric-à-brac de la dynastie m'épuisent. Est-il vraiment nécessaire que je réponde à vos questions ? »

languages.text: [Gähnen] "All diesen dynastischen Müll zu durchwühlen, ist ermüdend. Muss ich Eure Fragen unbedingt beantworten?"
languages.original_text: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"

traits.locale_text: [Gähnen] "All diesen dynastischen Müll zu durchwühlen, ist ermüdend. Muss ich Eure Fragen unbedingt beantworten?"

languages.text: [Esne] "Hanedanlığın hurdaları arasında eşelenip durmak çok yorucu. Sorularına cevap vermem çok mu elzem?"
languages.original_text: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"

traits.locale_text: [Esne] "Hanedanlığın hurdaları arasında eşelenip durmak çok yorucu. Sorularına cevap vermem çok mu elzem?"

languages.text: あくび「この家系図のゴミを掘り起こすのは疲れるわ。あなたの質問に答える必要があるの？」
languages.original_text: [Yawn] "All this digging through dynastic junk is tiresome. Is it essential that I answer your questions?"
